description: NeighborConnectionDetail schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

sourceServerId.description: The ID of the server that opened the network connection.

destinationServerId.description: The ID of the server that accepted the network connection.

destinationPort.description: The destination network port for the connection.

transportProtocol.description: The network protocol used for the connection.

connectionsCount.description: The number of open network connections with the neighboring server.
